title: A Psalm of Turning Season
subtitle: Safe re-entry after interior stripping; the turn from isolation to relationship
description: An artifact documenting a complex transition structure from Desert Faith through Pale Moon Guarding toward Sun Through Branches. It captures the 'descent of the ladder' from abstraction into lived life and relationship without losing the alignment gained in isolation.

motifMap.meaning: The hinge from abstraction and isolation into lived life, ground, and people.
Controlled reopening; allowing relationship again without craving it.

excerpt: I am descending a ladder. I am inviting a friend. I feel the new season coming in the wind.

sourceInputs: Phase Analysis 3.0 — “A Psalm of Turning Season”

integrity.notes: Generated based on Phase Analysis 3.0. Transition structure identified: Desert Faith → Guarding → Early Sun Through Branches.
